About Us

About ContractorCalc

ContractorCalc is an early-stage software tool designed specifically for contractors in construction, home services, and trades industries. The platform focuses on simplifying and streamlining job calculations, estimates, and financial management for independent contractors and small contracting businesses. Currently in pre-launch phase with a waitlist system, the company aims to provide mobile-friendly, accurate calculation tools that help contractors price jobs more efficiently and profitably. The brand positions itself as a specialized solution for contractors who need quick, reliable estimating capabilities without the complexity of enterprise-level software.

We work directly with businesses and individuals to understand their specific needs and build solutions that fit.

Our team brings hands-on experience and a practical approach to every project we take on.
